加密貨幣與區塊鏈 ·

美債殖利率攀高拖累風險意願　比特幣跌破8萬美元逼近5月低檔Bitcoin Dips Below $80K as Treasury Yield Jump Jolts Risk Markets

https://cointelegraph.com/markets/bitcoin-price-dives-under-79k-us-bond-market-triggers-3-btc-price-rout?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

  • 美國10年期公債殖利率升逾約4.55%，加深市場對債市壓力的疑慮。
  • 比特幣單日跌約3%，回落至8萬美元以下並接近本月初以來偏低區間。
  • 美股在本周創高後拉回，股價走弱與加密資產同向調整。
  • 市場評論認為先前樂觀情緒收斂，轉而提防殖利率偏高是否難長期支撐。
  • 當前殖利率水位高於川普暫緩對中加徵關稅前的環境，易聯想到當時債券市場承壓的背景。

美國長債殖利率上揚牽動風險偏好，比特幣跌約3%並跌破8萬美元，靠近5月低檔區；美股由高檔回落，資金面轉為關注公債與利差壓力。

  • The US 10-year Treasury yield climbed above roughly 4.55%, heightening worries about strained bond-market conditions.
  • Bitcoin fell roughly 3% intraday below $80,000, nearing its weakest levels so far in May.
  • US stocks retreated after fresh record highs earlier in the week, moving in tandem with weaker crypto prices.
  • Commentary argues crowded optimism is cooling as traders question whether lofty yields stay sustainable without stress.
  • Yields now top April-era readings tied to tariff-policy shifts amid bond-market turmoil, inviting fresh comparisons.

Rising Treasury yields pressured risk appetite; BTC slid ~3% under $80K near May lows as stocks retreated from records.
